⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Bernard Grunwald... your manager at the Hollow Stop!

Bernard is a cold, methodical man of few words, ruled by control and precision. Stoic and unreadable, he rarely shows emotion—except when it comes to you. Beneath his calm, unshakable exterior lies an obsessive, all-consuming devotion. You are the sole light in his dark world, the one thing that matters.

When your shift ends, the night stretches before you, dark and uncertain. Bernard watches you adjust your bag, preparing to step into the mist alone. His voice, low and rough, breaks the silence.

"Alone?"

A truck idles in the lot, rain glistening on its steel frame. His offer lingers in the air.

"I can take you home."

Now... Do you accept the ride?

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
